prompt: Create an enterprise architecture diagram titled 'Workspace vs Control Plane'. Show Google Drive, Docs, and Sheets as the human editorial workspace on one side; GitHub as the current durable control plane for governance, schemas, records, state, version history, and sync ledgers on the other; and a portable domain core above both using adapters. Include a degraded-mode path where work continues through GitHub and synchronizes later. Use clean executive styling and precise labels.
proof_boundaries: Represent GitHub as the current control plane, not permanent runtime identity.
Do not imply Drive is unavailable generally; show connector degradation as a possible operating mode.
Do not claim all synchronization is currently automatic.
